title: leucas glabrata
intro: Leucas glabrata, also known as Kariyan or Kavani, is a plant species native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and anti-diarrheal properties. The plant is known to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. Leucas glabrata is used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
